case_title: NATIONAL BUSINESS FACTORS, INC. vs. CRAWFORD, PIERRE

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL BUSINESS FACTORS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, PIERRE SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATIONAL BUSINESS FACTORS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, PIERRE $184.81 PRINCIPAL, $240.85 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $439.66 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
